description_long: This is a medium-sized stone and concrete bridge with two prominent arches supporting its span. The bridge deck is flat and paved, bordered on both sides by decorative balustrade railings made of stone or concrete, featuring evenly spaced vertical balusters. The structure is supported by robust piers at each end and at the midpoint, with the arches providing both structural integrity and visual appeal. The color palette consists mainly of dark gray for the deck and lighter gray for the railings, with a reddish-brown hue for the supporting arches and piers. There are no visible lighting fixtures or additional decorative elements beyond the classic balustrade design.
description: A stone and concrete arch bridge with decorative balustrade railings and a flat paved deck, supported by two large arches and robust piers.
description_view_0: This view highlights the dual arches beneath the bridge and the full length of the balustrade railings, showing the reddish-brown piers and the dark gray deck.
description_view_1: From this angle, the bridge's flat deck and the continuous balustrade railings are prominent, with the arches partially visible beneath.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this perspective emphasizes the arches and the symmetry of the bridge, with clear visibility of the supporting piers.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the deck and railings, with the arches less visible, showcasing the bridge's length and the uniformity of its design.
attribute_railing_design: stone or concrete balustrade with evenly spaced vertical balusters
